question_desc: Please indicate your civil status
What is the main occupation of the respondent?
Please select your highest degree obtained
Is the respondent able to read in English?
Is the respondent able to read in the local language?
Number of persons living together and sharing meals for more than 6 months a year
How many children under the age of 18 live in your household?
What is the most important crop that you produce?
What are the crops that you produce?
Have you contributed to a tricot trial before? If yes, how many times? Zero if first time.
Who in your household is mainly responsible for {your tricot crop} seed saving or seed exchange?
What is the source of {your tricot crop} seed?
How many different varieties of {your tricot crop} does your household produce?
What is the name of the variety(ies) that you commonly plant in your field?
Does the seed that you buy have a brand and a label? If yes, please indicate the name.
How do you usually sell {your tricot crop}?
Who in your household is mainly responsible for {your tricot crop} selling?
How far is the nearest market or place you sell your {your tricot crop} from your farm?
What share of your {your tricot crop} harvest do you usually sell?
What share of your total household income comes from selling {your tricot crop}?
Who in your household is mainly responsible for {your tricot crop} production?
Did you produced {your tricot crop} during the past 12 months?
How many times per year you usually produce your {tricot crop}?
If no production during the past 12 months, why?
Which of the following practices do you usually apply in {your tricot crop} production?
Do you store for a long time before consumption?
What type of storage method do you use?
If Yes, what is the longest storage duration you usually keep the harvest?
How do you handle the surplus of your harvest (more than you can eat immediately)?
Besides producing in your farm, do you also purchase the crop you tested in your trial from the market?
If Yes, based on what criteria do you use choose to buy? (Tick all that apply)
To what types of organization do you belong?
Are you in contact with government/public extension services in relation with {your tricot crop} production?
Are you in contact with private extension services in relation with {your tricot crop} production?
